title: atractylodes lancea
intro: Atractylodes lancea, also known as Bai Zhu, is a type of medicinal plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to China. It is traditionally used to tonify the spleen and stomach, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which help to regulate the body's immune response and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Atractylodes lancea include improved digestion, enhanced immune function, and reduced stress levels, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues and fatigue. Atractylodes lancea can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as dried roots, decoctions, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
